results.title: Senior Data Scientist
results.description: We are looking for a Senior Data Scientist to join our team. You will build ML models to improve merchant success. Required: Python, SQL, statistical modeling, A/B testing.

results.title: Machine Learning Engineer
results.description: Join RBC's AI team to develop and deploy ML models at scale. You will work on NLP and recommendation systems. Required: Python, PyTorch, MLOps experience.
